form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 6th of 11 at Mt Gambier Cl1-Sw on March 22 over 2050m, 9 len behind Zuleika with 59kg at $14. Followed that up with a sixth last start at Mt Gambier and will have to carry 71kg here.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign by head Werribee 0 - 58 May 31 over 2720m defeating Flood And Fire with 58kg at $19. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 13 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Both Sides Now carrying 58kg at $4.80. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 9 over 2350m, 2.75 len behind Off His Roca with 58kg at $7. Terrific chance to return to form.
